untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of: (1) N consecutive periods without pullback >3% — requires sequential bar counting not available in indicator set; (2) Material fundamental news events — fundamentals data not in allowed indicators; (3) Market ignoring contradictory news for 2-3 days — requires external news sentiment data not in allowed indicators; (4) Price extension measured in standard deviations — approximated using price_pos_20 but true multi-standard-deviation measurement needs calculated bb_std_dev unavailable. Core contrarian mean-reversion logic is expressible, but the 'hysterical blowoff' trigger conditions that differentiate this signal require external fundamental data and sequential pattern detection beyond technical indicators.
translation_notes: Approximated entry conditions using: (1) price_pos_20 as proxy for standard deviation extension from MA (values >2.0/-2.0 approximate >2 std devs); (2) hvol_20 elevation as proxy for elevated intraday volatility; (3) close crossing sma_20 as directional signal. Exit targets reversion to MA rather than 0.5 std devs due to lack of precise std_dev indicator. The critical 'disconnect between price and fundamental news' condition cannot be fully expressed without external news/sentiment data.
